# CareCircle

> An open-source healthcare coordination platform built in public.

CareCircle is an open-source platform designed to simplify communication and coordination between patients, caregivers, hospitals, and healthcare professionals.

The vision is to build a modern, secure, and extensible ecosystem that makes healthcare management more connected and accessible while remaining transparent and community-driven.

This project is being built completely in public. Every architectural decision, feature, mistake, and lesson learned will be documented throughout the development journey.

---

## Why CareCircle?

Healthcare information is often fragmented across multiple systems, making coordination difficult for both patients and healthcare providers.

CareCircle aims to solve problems such as:

- Managing patient information securely
- Coordinating care between multiple stakeholders
- Simplifying appointment and healthcare workflows
- Providing a modern and scalable platform for healthcare organizations
- Creating an open-source foundation that anyone can contribute to

---

## Project Goals

- Build a modern healthcare coordination platform
- Follow industry-standard software engineering practices
- Prioritize security, scalability, and maintainability
- Create beginner-friendly open-source opportunities
- Document every major engineering decision

---

## Tech Stack (Planned)

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Node.js
- PostgreSQL
- Prisma
- Docker
- AWS
- GitHub Actions

The stack may evolve as the project grows.

---

## Building in Public

CareCircle is more than just a project.

It's an engineering journey.

Every milestone—from the first commit to production deployment—will be shared publicly.

Expect updates on:

- System architecture
- Design decisions
- Development progress
- Challenges and mistakes
- Performance improvements
- Open-source contributions

---

## Roadmap

- [ ] Project setup
- [ ] Authentication & authorization
- [ ] User management
- [ ] Healthcare organization support
- [ ] Patient management
- [ ] Appointment scheduling
- [ ] Medical records
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] AI-powered features
- [ ] Public API
- [ ] Production deployment

---

## Contributing

Contributions are always welcome.

Whether you're fixing bugs, improving documentation, suggesting features, or reviewing code, every contribution helps make CareCircle better.

Contribution guidelines will be added as the project evolves.

---

## Project Status

🚧 Early Development

CareCircle is currently under active development.

Features, architecture, and APIs may change as the project matures.
